creator: drbowen@charter.net
text:
Sleepycat has changed the size of db-4.3.29.tar.gz affecting the size of
the package and both the MD5sum and the SHA1 digest.  This breaks the port
for databases/db43.  This also appears to be the case with databases/db44.

Fix: 

The ports for databases/db43 and databases/db44 need to be changed.
